content.speakerText: I should head out soon—thanks for having me!
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，谢谢你招待我！

options.text: Aw, already? Let's do this again soon!
Why are you leaving so early?
Can you help me clean up?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Aw, already? Let's do this again soon!' 是对告别表达的自然、热情回应，符合轻松道别场景。选项1虽礼貌但缺乏情感共鸣；选项3带有质问语气，不礼貌；选项4转移话题，不符合告别语境。

content.speakerText: I had such a great time tonight!

options.text: Really? I thought it was boring.
Yeah, the music was too loud.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Glad you liked it!' 用 glad 表达情感共鸣，是地道且得体的回应。选项1和3是否定或抱怨，破坏氛围；选项4是突然转换话题，不符合回应逻辑。

content.speakerText: Well, it's getting late—I should go.

options.text: Take care! Let's catch up soon!
Why are you leaving? We just got here!
Can you pay for the drinks?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Take care! Let's catch up soon!' 礼貌、温暖，符合轻松道别语境。选项1是冒犯性表达；选项3语气指责；选项4不合时宜地要求付款，完全偏离道别主题。

content.template: I should head out soon—thanks for having me! Aw, already? Let's do this ______ soon!
content.hint: 表达‘再聚一次’的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：let's do this again（期待再聚）

content.template: I had such a great time tonight! ______ you liked it!
content.hint: 回应对方开心时最自然的情感共鸣词
content.knowledgePoint: 情感共鸣表达：glad you liked it（地道回应）

content.template: It was wonderful seeing you! Drive ______ and talk soon!
content.hint: 告别时对对方出行的常见祝福语
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：drive safe（口语中常用，非正式但自然）

content.speakerText: I should head out soon—thanks for having me!
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，谢谢你招待我！
expectedAnswers: Aw, already? Let's do this again soon!
Thanks for coming! We’ll miss you!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了对告别者的感谢与不舍
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常告别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'let's do this again' 或 'drive safe' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I had such a great time tonight!
expectedAnswers: Me too! You're always welcome here!
Glad you enjoyed it—I can't wait to host you again!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的积极情绪并表达欢迎
语言准确性：是否正确使用 glad / same 等情感共鸣词
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过度正式的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'glad', 'same', 或 'welcome' 等关键词

content.speakerText: I think it's time for me to go—it's been lovely!
content.speakerTextCn: 我想我该走了——今晚真开心！
expectedAnswers: Oh, really? I'm so glad you came! Let's do this again soon!
Take care! Hope to see you at the next gathering!
Thanks for being here! You made the night special!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的感谢与告别意图
语言准确性：语法结构是否完整，用词是否恰当
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达，避免翻译腔
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'glad', 'see you again', 'take care' 等道别高频词
